memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Duncan MacDuff (1289-1353)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Donnchadh IV, Earl of Fife [Duncan IV][1] (1289–1353) was sometime Guardian of Scotland, and ruled Fife until his death. He was the last of the native Scottish rulers of that province.

He was born in …

zh.Lorne, Argyll, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife於1289年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏梅爾時，他的父親Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife27歲，母親Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife21歲。他於1307年與Mary de Monthermer結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1353年在蘇格蘭費伏登福姆林享年64歲。

zh-hans.Lorne, Argyll, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife于1289年出生在英国苏格兰費伏梅爾时，他的父亲Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife27岁，母亲Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife21岁。他于1307年与Mary de Monthermer结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1353年在苏格兰費伏登福姆林享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Donnchadh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife was born in 1289, in Methil, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife, was 27 and his mother, Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife, was 21. He married Mary de Monthermer in 1307. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1353, in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife est né en 1289, à Methil, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mary de Monthermer en 1307. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1353, à Dunfermline, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife 1289 in Methil, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife 27 und seine Mutter Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife 21. Er hat 1307 Mary de Monthermer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1353 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland.

Lui sposato Mary de Monthermer nel 1307. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1353, nel Dunfermline, Fife, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fifeが1289年にイギリススコットランドフィフメスイルで生まれた時，父Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fifeは27歳，母Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fifeは21歳であった。1307年にMary de Monthermerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1353年にスコットランドフィフダンフエルムラインで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife(이)가 1289년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 멧힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1307년 Mary de Monthermer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1353년 스컷랜드 피프 던퍼라이인에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife родился в 1289 г. в местности метил, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Monthermer в 1307 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1353 г. в местности дунфирмлаин, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет.
